headline: SLB Gears Up to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
summary: SLB heads into Q1 2026 earnings with estimates falling, as weak early-quarter oil prices offset a late-quarter surge boosting demand.

headline: Yardeni Says Buy Energy Stocks — Just As Trump's Iran Ceasefire Runs Out Of Time
summary: Ed Yardeni flipped back to overweight Energy after giving up on the sector two years ago: "The supply shock is likely to have a long tail."

headline: ConocoPhillips vs. Enbridge: Which Energy Stock Should You Buy?
summary: COP benefits from rising oil prices and low-cost supply, while ENB's contract-backed model delivers stable, predictable cash flows.

headline: Invesco Equity And Income Fund Q1 2026 Portfolio Review
summary: We purchased a new holding in the consumer discretionary sector. We also eliminated several holdings, using the proceeds to fund investments we believe have better risk/reward profiles.
